meaning: n.退,弱,退潮,衰落vi.潮退,衰退
examples: As night fell, our enthusiasm began to ebb away.
She sat in silence enjoying the ebb and flow of conversation.
The minister took up the theme and discoursed mellifluously on the ebb and flow of empires.
The opening scenes catch Wilberforce in 1797, when the cause is at a low ebb.
Juwono seems to have found himself in the thick of this ebb and flow.
